caption: Table 130. Document revision history
rows: Added reference to errata sheet ES0392 in Section 1: Introduction. Figure 1: STM32H750xB block diagram: changed APB1 and APB2 maximum frequency to 120 MHz, and WKUP[5:0] to WKUP[6:1]. Added note 1 to Table 2: STM32H755xI features and peripheral counts (added information on SDRAM availability) Updated Figure 5: STM32H755xI bus matrix. Modified Section 3.5.1: Power supply scheme Modified note on Section 3.5.3: Voltage regulator (SMPS step-down converter and LDO) Modified note in Section 3.5.3: Voltage regulator (SMPS step-down converter and LDO) Updated Section 3.24: Digital camera interface (DCMI) (modified supported format) Added Full-duplex mode in Section 3.34: Serial peripheral interfaces (SPI)/integrated interchip sound interfaces (I2S). Updated Section 3.27: True random number generator (RNG). Updated number of microphones that can be supported by the SAI in Section 3.35: Serial audio interfaces (SAI). Removed FDCAN1_RXFD_MODE, FDCAN1_TXFD_MODE, FDCAN2_RXFD_MODE and FDCAN2_TXFD_MODE functions from Table 8: STM32H750xB pin/ball definition and all alternate function tables. – Additional modifications made on Table 8: STM32H750xB pin/ball definition: Added note to VDD50USB. – Added note to PB12 and PB13. – Change PB1 I/O structure to TT_A. – Replaced PI8 WKUP3 additional function by WKUP2. – Replaced PC13 WKUP2 additional function by WKUP3. – For TFBGA24+25, extra VDD signals replaced by '-'. Updated Figure 13: Power supply scheme. Updated Section 6.2: Absolute maximum ratings introduction to device mission profile. Updated V max value in Table 13: General operating conditions CORE Changed f to 100 MHz in Table 13: General operating conditions. CPU2 Replaced Min V by Min V in Table 14: Supply voltage and DD DDLDO maximum frequency configuration. Replaced VBOR0 with VBOR0/POR/PDR in Table 19: Reset and power control block characteristics Updated section I/O dynamic current consumption and I/O static current consumption. Updated Table 41: High-speed external user clock characteristics. Removed note 1 from Table 33: Typical and maximum current consumption in Stop, LDO regulator ON and Table 35: Typical and maximum current consumption in Sleep mode, LDO regulator ON. In Table 52: Flash memory programming: removed reference to single bank configuration in title and added t typical and maximum values. ERASE128KB

Modified Table 55: EMI characteristics for fHSE = 8 MHz and fCPU = 400 MHz Added reference to AN4899 in Section 6.3.16: I/O port characteristics. Changed capacitance value for speed 10 and t/t, and speed for 11 and r f t/t/F Table 63: Output timing characteristics (HSLV ON). r f max Updated t /t and t t in su(DV-CLKH) h(DV-CLKH) su(NWAIT-CLKH)/h(NWAIT-CLKH) Table 73: Synchronous multiplexed NOR/PSRAM read timings. Changed t to t and updated t /t and (NWAIT-CLKH) su(NWAIT-CLKH) su(DV-CLKH) h(DV-CLKH) t t in Table 75: Synchronous non-multiplexed su(NWAIT-CLKH)/h(NWAIT-CLKH) NOR/PSRAM read timings. Updated t and t in su(SDCLKH _Data) h(SDCLKH _Data) Table 79: SDRAM read timings and Table 80: LPSDR SDRAM read timings. Replaced FMC_CLK by FMC_SDCLK in Section : SDRAM waveforms and timings. Updated t and t in Table 83: QUADSPI characteristics in SDR mode s(IN) h(IN) and t /t and t /t in Table 84: QUADSPI characteristics in sr(IN) sf(IN) hr(IN) hf(IN) DDR mode. Added reference to AN5354 application note in note of Table 86: ADC characteristics. Updated Figure 40: ADC accuracy characteristics and Figure 41: Typical connection diagram when using the ADC with FT/TT pins featuring analog switch function. Changed V maximum value to V -0.2 in Table 90: DAC DAC_OUT REF+ accuracy. Changed temperature condition to 130 °C for TS_CAL2 in Table 93: Temperature sensor calibration values Updated T maximum value inTable 92: Temperature sensor characteristics L Updated DuCy in Table 100: DFSDM measured timing - 1.62-3.6 V. CKOUT Updated Figure 49: USART timing diagram in SPI master mode and Figure 50: USART timing diagram in SPI slave mode. Updated t and t in Table 107: SPI dynamic characteristics. su(MI) h(MI) Updated Table 11: Current characteristics Updated t t , t t and t in Table 111: Dynamics characteristics: ISU, IH ISUD , IHD OH SD / MMC characteristics, VDD = 2.7 to 3.6 V. Updated t t in Table 112: Dynamics characteristics: eMMC ISU, IH characteristics VDD = 1.71V to 1.9V. Added Section : USB OTG_FS characteristics. Updated Table 114: Dynamics characteristics: USB ULPI Updated Section 7.5: LQFP144 package information (1A), Section 7.8: LQFP176 package information (1T), Section 7.9: LQFP208 package information, Section 7.10: UFBGA(176+25) package information (A0E7), and Section 7.12: TFBGA240+25 package information. Modified title for footprint figure and PCB design rules table (examples instead of recommendations) Added note related to the availability of tape and reel packing in Section 8: Ordering information. Added Section 9: Important security notice.

In the context of I2C, replaced master and slave by controller and target, respectively. Updated features on cover page. Updated Table 2: STM32H755xI features and peripheral counts. Updated Figure 1: STM32H755xI block diagram. Updated Section 3.4: Boot modes. Updated Table 7: Legend/abbreviations used in the pinout table. Updated Table 8: STM32H755xI pin/ball definition. Updated Table 9: Alternate functions. Updated Figure 13: Power supply scheme. Updated Table 13: General operating conditions. Updated Table 15: VCAP operating conditions. Updated Figure 16: External components for SMPS step-down converter. Updated Table 39: Peripheral current consumption in Run mode. Updated Section : Low-speed external user clock generated from an external source. Updated Figure 23: Typical application with an 8 MHz crystal. Updated Table 59: I/O static characteristics. Updated Figure 40: ADC accuracy characteristics. Updated Table 86: ADC characteristics. Updated Table 92: Temperature sensor characteristics. Updated Table 93: Temperature sensor calibration values. Updated Section : I2C interface characteristics. Updated Table 120: LQFP144 - Mechanical data. Updated Table 121: LQFP176 - Mechanical data. Updated Table 122: LQFP208 - Mechanical data. Updated Table 128: TFBGA240+25 - Example of PCB design rules.
